title: 'Uwr #0218
definition:
Ur = "flame"

 1) city in southern Babylonia, city of the Chaldeans, centre of
    moon worship, home of Abraham's father, Terah, and departure
    point for the Abraham's migration to Mesopotamia and Canaan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ur = "flame"

 1) city in southern Babylonia, city of the Chaldeans, centre of
    moon worship, home of Abraham's father, Terah, and departure
    point for the Abraham's migration to Mesopotamia and Canaan

    NASB:  a city in S. Bab.
